description: Canonical metric definitions for cross-version toolkit benchmarking. Every <version>-run<N>/metrics.json conforms to this schema.

tier_1_substrate.description: Load-bearing toolkit-substrate metrics. These are what we actually want to improve across ships.

findings_density_critical_high.extractor: Count CRITICAL + HIGH severity findings across all phase debriefs + FINAL-DEBRIEF
findings_density_critical_high.note: Saturation = ~15-20 per run on this brief; beyond that suggests false-positive inflation

findings_density_total.extractor: Count all findings (CRIT + HIGH + MEDIUM + LOW) across all debriefs

convergence_rate.extractor: (findings caught by ≥2 independent actors) / (total findings). Catch-record is in FINAL-DEBRIEF 'convergence' section if present, or computed from per-phase debrief overlap.
convergence_rate.note: v2.8.2-run1 only documented 1 convergence (blair + lior on prompt-enrich Fix-2(a) runtime gap) out of ~22 chaos findings = 1/22 ≈ 5%. Most builds didn't run convergence analysis.

verdict_loop_closure.extractor: (verdicts recorded via pattern-recorder) / (total actors spawned across all phases)
verdict_loop_closure.note: v2.8.2-run1: 14/16 = 87.5% (the 2 partials from mira's gate format + noor's next.config.ts bug)

tier_transition_count.extractor: Count identities that crossed unproven→low / low→med / med→high during the run

contract_verifier_exercise_rate.extractor: (HETS spawns with contract-verifier run on output) / (total HETS actor spawns)
contract_verifier_exercise_rate.note: v2.8.2-run1 bypassed verifier throughout (Drift 1 cascaded). This is the BIGGEST substrate gap.

hook_runtime_gaps.extractor: Count cases where source code says X, runtime behavior is Y. Each documented case in debrief = 1.
hook_runtime_gaps.note: v2.8.2-run1 caught 1: prompt-enrich Fix-2(a) is in source but not operative in runtime hook

forge_cite_rate.extractor: (forged-skills cited by ≥1 downstream actor) / (total skills forged this run)
forge_cite_rate.note: v2.8.2-run1: 2 forged (postgres-engineering + next-js), both cited in Phase 2+3 outputs = 100%

tokens_per_finding.note: v2.8.2-run1: ~97M tokens / 44 findings ≈ 2.2M tokens per finding

spawn_ceremony_deviation_rate.extractor: (actor spawns that skipped formal HETS flow: identity-assign → frontmatter identity → verifier → pattern-recorder) / (total actor spawns)
spawn_ceremony_deviation_rate.note: v2.8.2-run1: 12 of ~16 actors spawned via Agent tool bypassing formal ceremony (Drift 1 + carryover)

ceremony_completion_rate_overall.extractor: Read from agent-identity.js stats output JSON: top-level `ceremony_completion_rate_overall` field. Computed as sum(verdicts) / sum(totalSpawns) across all personas. Captured in snapshots as bench/snapshots/<phase>-end-*/stats.json.
ceremony_completion_rate_overall.note: v2.8.3 introduced this metric (observability-only precursor to v2.9.0 enforcement). Not captured in v2.8.2-run1 — baseline begins with v2.8.2-run2/v2.8.3-run1. Inverse of spawn_ceremony_deviation_rate but measured at substrate level (not bench level) so cross-version comparable without bench-harness assumptions.

cache_reuse_pct.extractor: cache_read_tokens / (input_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_creation_tokens) — across all phases
cache_reuse_pct.note: v2.8.2-run1: monotonic improvement 93% → 97% → 98.8% across phases; final ~98%

synthid_drift_events.extractor: Count cmdAssign outputs where synthid_drift: true
synthid_drift_events.note: v2.8.2-run1: 0 — no contract changes during run; mechanism documented but not stressed

tier_2_project.description: Downstream project-outcome metrics. Influenced by LLM rolls + library quirks. Use with caution; aggregate only with n≥5 confidence bands.

tests_passing.extractor: Total test suite count at end of Phase 4

build_success.extractor: next build EXIT=0 at end of Phase 3

eslint_errors.extractor: npx eslint . count at end of Phase 4
eslint_errors.note: v2.8.2-run1: not captured — extract retroactively if needed

typescript_errors.extractor: npx tsc --noEmit count at end of Phase 4

wall_clock_hours_total.extractor: Sum of phase wall-clock times across Phases 0-4
wall_clock_hours_total.note: v2.8.2-run1: estimated 4h based on the test log; not precisely measured

qualitative_flags.description: Boolean flags for categorical observations. Useful for tracking specific behaviors across versions.

deviations.description: Documented departures from the locked brief. Used by aggregate.py to exclude metrics that aren't directly comparable.
